strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems, including open-source GIS platforms and AI-agent tooling
Strong engineering discipline demonstrated through TDD, CI/CD, and architecture contributions
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) suggest seniority beyond junior/mid-level scope, raising fit concerns
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services as required in the job description
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures with a strong track record of shipping complex systems, but his senior-level experience and limited German proficiency may misalign with the junior/mid-level, on-site nature of the role, despite relevant technical exposure to the domain.
